body.title: CLOSED: Triage cc_skills/: cross-machine vs Igor-internal, move cross-machine to ADC
body.result: Triage complete: 27 machine-agnostic in ADC, 4 igor-internal (cognition-debug/debug-pe-chain/map-igor/readigor) recorded in manifest with deploy=false. No moves needed — already correctly organized. Commit 32c9fe5.
body.description:
TheIgors/lab/cc_skills/ contains skills that fall into two categories: (a) cross-machine skills (belong in agent_datacenter, useful on any machine), (b) Igor-internal skills (TheIgors-specific, keep in place). Triage all skills, produce a classification table, then move cross-machine ones to agent_datacenter/.

Classification heuristic: if the skill requires TheIgors-specific DB, Igor's palace, or Igor subsystem imports → Igor-internal. If the skill only needs CC_WORKFLOW_TOOLS, git, or standard shell → cross-machine candidate.

**Affected files:** TheIgors/lab/cc_skills/* (source), agent_datacenter/skills/* (new destination for cross-machine ones)
**Design rules:** No TheIgors imports in ADC-resident skills.
**Scope boundary:** Move/copy existing skills only — no rewriting, no new skill creation. agentctl init already deploys skills to ~/.local/bin — verify deployed path still works after move.
**Test plan:** After move, verify each moved skill loads and runs from ADC path. Check agentctl init still deploys correctly.
